message.content:
@startuml
actor Actor
participant "WizardAction" as WizardAction
participant "frame : WizardFrame" as frame
participant "controller : WizardController" as controller
participant "Language" as Language
participant "UIController" as UIController
participant "FromulaCompiler" as FromulaCompiler

note right of Actor: Extention loading and integration with main UI can be found on Example Extention diagrams

Actor -> WizardAction: starts use case
WizardAction -> frame: new(UIController)
frame -> controller: new(UIController)
controller -> Language: getFunctions()
controller -> Language: getInstance()
controller -> Language: getFunctions()

loop
    frame -> frame: displayInformation()
end

Actor -> frame: Select Function
frame -> controller: getExpression(function)

loop
    frame -> frame: loadTextFields()
end

frame -> Actor: show the expression to user
Actor -> frame: Sets parameters and selects ok
frame -> controller: getResult(String expression)
controller -> UIController: cell=getActiveCell()
controller -> FromulaCompiler: getInstance()
controller -> FromulaCompiler: compile(cell,expression)
controller -> frame: return result

@enduml
